Name: True Ping
Author: doomzao
Punchline: Your real FFXIV ping: the latency you actually feel, with jitter and loss.
Description: Measures the true application-layer ping by timing the game's own keepalive handshake (the round-trip the server answers), not the OS network latency. Because it reads the game protocol, it reports the real latency you feel even when you route through a proxy or VPN such as ExitLag, where naive ping tools only see localhost. Shows current ping, average/min/max, jitter and packet loss, in a floating overlay and in the server info bar.
